title: isodon inflexus f. verticillatus
intro: Isodon inflexus f. verticillatus, also known as Chinese isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isodon inflexus f. verticillatus include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Isodon inflexus f. verticillatus is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water, although it can also be consumed as a capsule or tincture in modern herbal preparations.
